mainEntity.name: What NY laws affect attorney AI marketing claims?
mainEntity.text: What NY laws affect attorney AI marketing claims?

acceptedAnswer.text: NY Rules of Professional Conduct 7.1-7.5 prohibit false/misleading ads. AI visibility must avoid guarantees, disclose AI use, and cite verifiable wins.

suggestedAnswer.text: New York Bar enforces strict ad rules; AI-optimized 'best lawyer' claims need disclaimers. Disclose generated content. Violations risk sanctions. Services ensure compliance in schema/FAQs. Consult ethics counsel pre-launch. Insurers flag non-compliant sites.

name: NY Legal Rules for AI Marketing
description: NY Rules of Professional Conduct 7.1-7.5 prohibit false/misleading ads. AI visibility must avoid guarantees, disclose AI use, and cite verifiable wins.
